titleStmt.title: Salt Chamber of Commerce of Northwich

div.head: Salt Chamber of Commerce of Northwich
div.dateline:
Salt Chamber of Commerce,
Northwich, Cheshire , May 6, 1865.
div.p: Your Excellency: The salt trade of England, represented by this chamber, have, perhaps more than any other mercantile community of this country, cause to identify their interests with those of the great American people.

The council of this chamber have therefore instructed me, by unanimous resolution, to convey to your excellency their profound grief and heartfelt sympathy with the American nation at the great calamity which has befallen them, through the dastardly assassination of their late President.
In thus representing their condolence, this chamber pray you to accept their earnest assurance of profound respect for your excellency.
div.closer:
JOHN MOORE,
Secretary of the Salt Chamber of Commerce.

postscript.p: His Excellency the President of the United States.
